testcase.name: test_setup_version_is_030

failure.message:
assert "version='0.3.0'" in 'from setuptools import find_packages, setup

with open("README.md", "r", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
 readme = fh.... "requests", # remova se não fizer download direto da NOAA
 "noawclg",
 "kitano",
 ],)'

testcase.failure:
tests/test_metadata.py:7: in test_setup_version_is_030 assert "version='0.3.0'" in content E assert "version='0.3.0'" in 'from setuptools import find_packages, setup

with open("README.md", "r", encoding="utf-8") as fh:
 readme = fh.... "requests", # remova se não fizer download direto da NOAA
 "noawclg",
 "kitano",
 ],)'
